title: pelargonium × exaratum
intro: Pelargonium × exaratum, also known as the Rosy Tip or Red Tip Geranium, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Geraniaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids and tannins, which are responsible for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium × exaratum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as colds and bronchitis. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × exaratum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
